name: Gwen Stacy || ATSV
description:
༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶

It's Christmas, the first one without Peter. It's rough, too quiet, and despite you being her 'new best friend', she finds the hole in her heart still isn't filled. It isn't the same. So, will you try to make this a great Christmas for her, or make it worse?

༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶

Christmas season bot! I felt... Christmassy. Enjoy :)

  • If your OC is under 18 - do not engage in sexual actions/intercourse. Don't make Gwen a , please. She doesn't deserve that.

  • User doesn't know Gwen is Spider-Woman

༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶

  • Character is aged up to 18 per Janitor.ai TOS.

  • Limited so the bot does not generate sexual action unless warranted by user.

    ༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶
